content: اِلمَحَل دَه بِيِفتَح مِن اِلصُبح لِبَعد اِلظُهر
translations: eng:this shop opens from morning till afternoon

transcriptions.arabizi: ilmahal dah biyiftah min ilsubhali|baAd ilzuhr
